evidence: "Best rendition of JFK I have seen... historical treasure and should not be missed."
"Thoroughly enjoyable way to spend an evening or afternoon. BBC adaptation."
"Great cast, great writing, lots of plot twists and turns. Very nuanced characters."
"So much information presented so quickly in the film that you don't catch or understand all of it the first or even second viewing."
"Had to watch Season 7 Premiere several times to figure out what was going on!"
"It's porn disguised as a Wall Street story. Not sexy. Just gross."
"Great script, great casting, great acting, great directing!"
"The acting is great--DeNiro, Jack Nicholson, Robert Mitchum, Tony Curtis."
"Meryl Streep, as always, nailed the accent on this one... Great chemistry."
"Oliver Stone's JFK More Relevant Today on 50th Anniversary of JFK Assassination..."
"The scenery alone is worth watching this show for."
"Great commentary by the stars Robert Redford and Paul Newman."
"Everytime I view it, I learn something new, see something I had not seen before."
"To me, it's the best romantic film of all time!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and historical narratives, often appreciating complex storytelling with nuanced characters. They value high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, frequently highlighting the performances of well-known actors and directors.
